allow: Bash(node -e "const s = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/content/exclusions.ts','utf8'\); const needs = ['SPONSORED_MARKER','COMPANY_PAGE_MARKER','OPEN_TO_WORK_MARKER','isNonEnglish','interface ExclusionResult']; const miss = needs.filter\(n => !s.includes\(n\)\); if \(miss.length\) { console.error\('missing:', miss\); process.exit\(1\); } console.log\('ok'\);")
